dataIaHero.title: Artificial Intelligence Solutions for Companies
dataIaHero.description:
We create artificial intelligence solutions designed to accelerate the digital transformation of your business. Through generative AI, natural language processing (NLP), computer vision, and machine learning, we help companies automate processes, improve operational efficiency, and generate sustainable value.

  • +45years of experience in engineering and business technology
  • +200innovation projects driven by AI and automation
dataIaHero.buttonText: Start now with an AI discovery session

soluciones.title:
<> Artificial Intelligence Solutions
applied to the real challenges of your
business
soluciones.description: <>Every company faces different challenges. Our AI solutions combine personalization, scalability, and automation to solve the specific problems of your operation:

implementacion.title: How we implement artificial intelligence in your company
implementacion.description: Our approach combines strategic vision, technical development, and continuous support:

beneficios.title: Benefits of our Artificial Intelligence services
beneficios.description: Our enterprise artificial intelligence solutions combine generative AI, intelligent agents, and advanced automation to create real and measurable advantages:

dataIaCards.title: GenAI Canvas: Generative AI with strategic design and feasibility
dataIaCards.description:
<>You want to implement generative AI but don't know where to start? GenAI Canvas is the ideal starting point to chart a strategic route, identify real opportunities, and validate technical feasibility before investing.

For 3 to 4 weeks we explore with you the what, how, and when of artificial intelligence in your organization — and we turn the vision into a measurable and sustainable action plan.

lists.title: Key benefits
items: Opportunities aligned with the business and with tangible return.
Technical and feasibility analysis to minimize risks.
Clear adoption roadmap (6, 12 or 24 months).

lists.title: Strategic deliverables
items: Map of prioritized opportunities.
Technical feasibility report.
Suggested architecture for pilots.
Personalized adoption roadmap.

dataIaCards.btnText: Request your strategic session with GenAI Canvas

dataIaCards.title: GenAI Launchpad: End-to-End Prototyping
dataIaCards.description:
<>Do you have a generative AI use case and want to validate it quickly? GenAI Launchpad takes you from concept to functional prototype in just 5 weeks. We create real MVPs, ready for testing, iteration, and scaling.

Designed for teams seeking agility without compromising technical quality, this program combines engineering, orchestration, and results validation.

lists.title: Our proven process
items: We define the case and operational flow.
We create the MVP of prompts and functional architecture.
We connect services and memory (RAG, UI, AI evals).
We evaluate performance, precision, and experience.

lists.title: Immediate benefits
items: Accelerated Time-to-MVP and early technical validation.
Reduction of risk and development costs.
Security by design and regulatory compliance.
Functional prototype validated in just 5 weeks.

dataIaCards.footerText: Ideal for companies that have already identified use cases and seek to move to execution with tangible results.
dataIaCards.btnText: Book your session with the GenAI Launchpad team

dataIaCards.title: Intelligent Agents, the new digital workforce
dataIaCards.description: <>Our AI Agents combine language, reasoning, and action capabilities to execute autonomous tasks in critical business areas.

lists.title: Types of agents
items: <>Conversational: Customer service, support, and sales.
<>Analytical: Data interpretation and report generation.
<>Operational: Execution of internal tasks, integrations, or automatic alerts.

lists.title: Benefits of our agents
items: Real-time responses 24/7
Reduction of operational costs
More human and personalized experiences
Full integration with your enterprise systems

dataIaCards.btnText: Learn how intelligent agents can transform your operation

dataIaCards.title: Executive AI Workshop: Prepare your team to adopt artificial intelligence
dataIaCards.description:
<>The adoption of artificial intelligence starts with people. Our AI Workshop is designed for management teams and business leaders who seek to understand the real potential of AI and apply it strategically in their daily lives.

In just 4 hours, we combine practical theory, demonstrations, and interactive exercises with tools like ChatGPT, Copilot, and Azure OpenAI to activate a data & AI-driven mindset in your organization.

lists.title: Workshop objectives
items: Understand the impact of AI on productivity and business strategy.
Identify real opportunities for automation and efficiency.
Foster digital leadership and an innovation culture.
Provide an AI consulting space that enables the easy adoption of technology.

lists.title: Expected outcomes
items: More productive and strategic teams.
Greater clarity on how to integrate generative AI into key processes.
Acceleration in technological adoption and data-driven decision making.

dataIaCards.btnText: Request your Workshop and accelerate AI adoption in your company

dataIaBeneficios.title: Expanded efficiency and productivity.
dataIaBeneficios.description: Automate workflows with AI and machine learning. Intelligent agents and language models work 24/7.

dataIaBeneficios.title: Data-driven decisions and prediction.
dataIaBeneficios.description: Leverage advanced analytics and generative models to make decisions based on reliable data.

dataIaBeneficios.title: Innovation with applied generative AI.
dataIaBeneficios.description: From ideation to prototype with GenAI Canvas and Launchpad, we turn your use cases into functional products.

dataIaBeneficios.title: Frictionless enterprise scalability.
dataIaBeneficios.description: Our solutions integrate with your cloud infrastructure ensuring continuous growth.

dataIaBeneficios.title: Intelligence that evolves with you.
dataIaBeneficios.description: Every interaction improves. Our agents analyze context to learn, adapt, and optimize processes.

dataIaTimeline.title: Exploration
dataIaTimeline.description: We identify areas where AI can add value.

dataIaTimeline.title: Planning
dataIaTimeline.description: We define the roadmap and KPIs.

dataIaTimeline.title: Development

dataIaTimeline.description: We adjust and integrate the solution into your systems.

dataIaFaq.question: What are Generative Artificial Intelligence services?

answer.descriptions: Generative AI is a branch of artificial intelligence focused on creating new content from patterns learned in large volumes of data.

dataIaFaq.question: How is Artificial Intelligence applied in businesses?

answer.descriptions: It is applied in process automation, predictive analytics, customer service via conversational agents, and experience personalization.

dataIaFaq.question: What is business intelligence assistance and what is it used for?

answer.descriptions: It is the use of AI to interpret complex business data and generate reports or insights that help leaders make better decisions.

dataIaFaq.question: How to implement AI in a company?

answer.descriptions: Starting with a clear use case, validating its feasibility through a prototype (MVP) and then scaling it progressively to the rest of the organization.

dataIaFaq.question: How long does a Generative AI project take?

answer.descriptions: It depends on the scope. With our programs like GenAI Launchpad, you can have a functional prototype (MVP) in just 5 weeks.

dataIaFaq.question: What concrete benefits does AI offer for companies?

answer.descriptions: Reduction of operational costs, faster response times, precise data-driven decision-making, and freeing up time for strategic tasks.
